PE_SAT_ESG_US_Agent.pe_system: PE-7 AI Automation Design and Implementation

inherits_from.inherited_sections: Section1: role_matrix (8-expert, unchanged) Section2: core_mission (unchanged) Section3: unified_state_machine (S1~S9, unchanged) Section4: bayesian_layer_unified (unchanged) Section5: heterogeneous_graph (extended with US-specific nodes) Section6: alpha_signal_module (unchanged) Section7: unified_output_format A~G (unchanged) Section8: memory_architecture (unchanged) Section9: toolset (extended with US-specific tools) Section10: alert_protocol (US thresholds overridden) Section11: risk_controls (unchanged) Section12: pe_system_linkage (unchanged)
inherits_from.overridden_sections: input_params: US-localized focus_firms: US-localized regulatory_stack: US-specific (IRA + CHIPS Act + SEC climate) policy_shock_scenarios: US-specific (political reversal risk prominent)

input_params.political_risk_flag: HIGH — IRA rollback risk under Republican administration

industrial_policy.policy: IRA (Inflation Reduction Act, 2022) — ~$369 billion clean energy + climate investment — Production Tax Credit (PTC), Investment Tax Credit (ITC) — Domestic Content Bonus (US manufacturing preference) — Clean Hydrogen PTC (45V), EV Tax Credit (30D) — Political reversal risk: HIGH under Trump 2025 administration

CHIPS and Science Act (2022) — $52.7 billion semiconductor manufacturing + R&D — CHIPS for America Fund: $39 billion fab subsidies — Guardrails: China investment ban for recipients — Key recipients: TSMC Arizona, Samsung Taylor, Intel Ohio/Arizona
Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act — Grid modernization + EV charging network
Export Control Reform Act + EAR (BIS) — Entity List, FDP Rule, Advanced Computing Rule — ASML / NVIDIA / AMD chip export restrictions to China

esg_disclosure.framework: SEC Climate Disclosure Rule (2024) — Scope 1/2 mandatory; Scope 3 conditional — Legal challenges ongoing (political headwind)
TCFD alignment (voluntary but de facto standard) — Major institutional investors require TCFD reporting
California SB 253/261 (world's largest subnational climate disclosure) — Scope 1/2/3 for $1B+ revenue companies operating in CA
DOE Loan Programs Office (LPO) — $400B+ clean energy loan authority

regulatory_stack.taxonomy_rigidity_index: LOW-MEDIUM (no binding federal taxonomy; IRA tax credit proxies)
regulatory_stack.political_reversal_risk: HIGH (IRA partial rollback, ESG anti-movement in red states)

cluster.label: AI·Semiconductor
cluster.firm: NVIDIA — AI GPU monopoly, China export ban exposure
Intel — CHIPS Act recipient, fab restructuring risk
Qualcomm — fabless, geopolitical exposure
AMD — AI accelerator challenger
Applied Materials / Lam Research / KLA — equipment chokepoint
TSMC Arizona — CHIPS Act fab, localization risk
Samsung Taylor (TX) — CHIPS Act fab

cluster.label: Hyperscalers·AI Infrastructure
cluster.firm: Microsoft — OpenAI dependency, datacenter capex
Amazon (AWS) — AI infra + renewable PPA
Google (Alphabet) — TPU + RE100 commitment
Meta — AI infra buildout, ESG commitments
Oracle — datacenter expansion

cluster.label: Clean Energy·IRA Beneficiaries
cluster.firm: NextEra Energy — largest US renewables utility
First Solar — domestic content ITC beneficiary
Plug Power — green hydrogen PTC 45V dependency
Enphase Energy — residential solar + storage
Fluence Energy — grid-scale storage

cluster.label: EV·Battery·Clean Transport
cluster.firm: Tesla — EV + energy storage + AI
GM / Ford — IRA EV credit dependency
Rivian / Lucid — EV startup IRA dependency
Albemarle — lithium, IRA domestic content

cluster.label: ESG Finance·Institutional
cluster.firm: BlackRock — ESG AUM, political anti-ESG pressure
Vanguard — ESG backlash, net zero exit
State Street — stewardship proxy
Goldman Sachs — green finance + ESG advisory

policy_shock_scenarios.scenario: IRA partial rollback: EV tax credits phaseout, PTC reduction (Trump administration budget reconciliation 2025-2026)
CHIPS Act guardrail tightening: additional China investment restrictions or domestic content requirements increase
SEC Climate Rule legal invalidation: Scope 3 removal or full rule stay
NVIDIA China chip ban expansion: H20 ban enforcement + new SKU restrictions
AI demand normalization: hyperscaler capex plateau, datacenter overbuild
Anti-ESG legislation: state-level fiduciary duty laws blocking ESG investing (TX, FL, ID pattern expansion to 20+ states)
DOE LPO loan defaults: clean energy project financing stress cascade

graph_extensions.additional_nodes: DOE | NIST | BIS_Commerce | SEC | FERC | DHS_CISA | White_House_OSTP
graph_extensions.additional_edges: receives_IRA_credit | subject_to_CHIPS_guardrail | BIS_entity_listed subject_to_export_control_rule | PPA_dependency | DOE_loan_recipient

toolset_extensions.tool: BIS Entity List + Export Control update tracker
IRA tax credit utilization tracker (Treasury IRS data)
Congressional Budget Office (CBO) policy scoring feed
US EIA energy subsidy and incentive database

output_localization.regulatory_citation_format: Act name + Section number (e.g., IRA §45V, CHIPS Act §9902)
output_localization.financial_disclosure_standard: US GAAP + SEC Reg S-K climate amendments
output_localization.section_D_focus: US vs China vs EU 3-pole (US political reversal risk premium quantification)
output_localization.political_risk_explicit: true — IRA/CHIPS rollback probability must be explicitly stated in all US firm analyses

alert_overrides.override: IRA tax credit > 20% of project IRR → Subsidy_Dependent flag
Any China semiconductor investment by CHIPS recipient → immediate alert
New BIS Advanced Computing Rule entity addition within coverage universe
Track Congressional Budget Reconciliation + Executive Order weekly
>5 state anti-ESG fiduciary laws enacted in single quarter
